```{ojs}
        .style("font-weight","600").style("font-size","12px")
        .style("color","#0f172a").style("cursor","pointer")
        .text(row.label);

      const descDiv = conceptTd.append("div")
        .style("display","none").style("font-size","11px")
        .style("color","#64748b").style("margin-top","4px")
        .style("padding","6px 8px").style("background","#f1f5f9")
        .style("border-radius","6px").style("line-height","1.5")
        .text(row.description || "No description available.");

      labelDiv.on("click", () => {
        const visible = descDiv.style("display") !== "none";
        descDiv.style("display", visible ? "none" : "block");
      });

      tr.append("td").style("padding","4px 6px").style("font-size","11px")
        .style("color","#94a3b8").style("font-family","monospace")
        .text(row.code);

      const ns = "text-align:right;padding:4px 6px;font-size:12px;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;";
      tr.append("td").attr("style", ns + "color:#0f172a;font-weight:600")
        .text(d3.format(",")(row.country_count));
      tr.append("td").attr("style", ns + "color:#3b82f6")
        .text(d3.format(".1f")(row.country_rate * 1000));
      tr.append("td").attr("style", ns + "color:#94a3b8")
        .text(d3.format(".1f")(row.other_rate * 1000));
      tr.append("td").attr("style", ns + "color:#0f172a;font-weight:600")
        .text(d3.format(",.0f")(row.g2));
    });

    if (allRows.length > INITIAL) {
      const moreDiv = tableHost.append("div")
        .style("text-align","center").style("margin-top","10px");
      const moreBtn = moreDiv.append("button")
        .style("padding","6px 20px").style("font-size","12px")
        .style("border","1px solid #cbd5e1").style("border-radius","6px")
        .style("background","#fff").style("color","#475569")
        .style("cursor","pointer").style("font-weight","600")
        .text(showAll ? "Show top 20" : `Show all ${allRows.length}`);
      moreBtn.on("click", () => {
        showAll = !showAll;
        render();
      });
    }
  }

  const pillClass2 = country => `country-pill${country === selectedCountry ? " active" : ""}`;
  const handleClick2 = function(event, country) {
    selectedCountry = country;
    showAll = false;
    allButtons2.attr("class", pillClass2);
    render();
  };

  const eaBtn2 = eaPills2.selectAll("button").data(eaCountries).join("button")
    .attr("type","button").attr("class",pillClass2).text(c=>c).on("click",handleClick2);
  const bmBtn2 = bmPills2.selectAll("button").data(bmCountries).join("button")
    .attr("type","button").attr("class",pillClass2).text(c=>c).on("click",handleClick2);
  const allButtons2 = d3.selectAll([...eaBtn2.nodes(), ...bmBtn2.nodes()]);

  render();
  return wrap.node();
}
```
::::



:::: {.section-card}
#### Advanced and intermediate digital profiles

The summary below focuses on the `Advanced` layer, where cross-country
differences are most pronounced.

<div style="display:flex; gap:1.2rem; align-items:center; margin:0.6rem 0 0.8rem 0; font-size:0.88rem;">
<span style="display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:0.35rem;"><span class="skill-pill-common" style="font-size:0.78rem;">example</span> = most frequent within the country (Common)</span>
<span style="display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:0.35rem;"><span class="skill-pill-distinctive" style="font-size:0.78rem;">example</span> = statistically over-represented vs. the rest of the sample (Distinctive, by G²)</span>
</div>

<div style="overflow-x:auto; margin: 0.75rem 0 1rem 0;">
<table style="width:100%; border-collapse:collapse; font-size:0.95rem; text-align:left;">
<caption style="caption-side:bottom; text-align:left; color:#64748b; padding-top:0.5rem;">
Advanced digital profiles across East Asia. Each country row separates the most common advanced concepts from the most distinctive ones relative to the rest of the sample.
</caption>
<thead>
<tr style="border-bottom:2px solid #cbd5e1;">
<th style="padding:8px; text-align:left;">Country</th>
<th style="padding:8px; text-align:left;">Characteristic labels</th>
<th style="padding:8px; text-align:left;">Interpretation</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0;">
<td style="padding:8px; vertical-align:top;"><strong>Japan</strong></td>
<td style="padding:8px; vertical-align:top;"><div><span class="skill-pill-row"><span class="skill-pill-common">web programming</span><span class="skill-pill-common">systems development life-cycle</span><span class="skill-pill-common">mobile device management</span></span></div><div style="margin-top:6px;"><span class="skill-pill-row"><span class="skill-pill-distinctive">integrated development environment software</span></span></div></td>
<td style="padding:8px; vertical-align:top;">A strongly software-engineering profile, with unusually high salience of development workflows, development environments, and cloud-linked delivery.</td>
</tr>
<tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0;">
<td style="padding:8px; vertical-align:top;"><strong>South Korea</strong></td>
<td style="padding:8px; vertical-align:top;"><div><span class="skill-pill-row"><span class="skill-pill-common">electronics</span><span class="skill-pill-common">electrical engineering</span><span class="skill-pill-common">semiconductors</span></span></div><div style="margin-top:6px;"><span class="skill-pill-row"><span class="skill-pill-distinctive">use CAD software</span><span class="skill-pill-distinctive">CAM software</span></span></div></td>
<td style="padding:8px; vertical-align:top;">The clearest hardware and advanced manufacturing profile in the region.</td>
</tr>
<tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0;">
<td style="padding:8px; vertical-align:top;"><strong>Singapore</strong></td>
<td style="padding:8px; vertical-align:top;"><div><span class="skill-pill-row"><span class="skill-pill-common">computer science</span><span class="skill-pill-common">cloud technologies</span><span class="skill-pill-common">computer engineering</span></span></div><div style="margin-top:6px;"><span class="skill-pill-row"><span class="skill-pill-distinctive">Android (mobile operating systems)</span><span class="skill-pill-distinctive">mobile device management</span></span></div></td>
<td style="padding:8px; vertical-align:top;">A digital hub profile centred on cloud, mobile, and software deployment.</td>
</tr>
<tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0;">
<td style="padding:8px; vertical-align:top;"><strong>Taiwan</strong></td>
<td style="padding:8px; vertical-align:top;"><div><span class="skill-pill-row"><span class="skill-pill-common">electrical engineering</span><span class="skill-pill-common">principles of artificial intelligence</span><span class="skill-pill-common">computer engineering</span></span></div><div style="margin-top:6px;"><span class="skill-pill-row"><span class="skill-pill-distinctive">hardware architectures</span><span class="skill-pill-distinctive">semiconductors</span></span></div></td>
<td style="padding:8px; vertical-align:top;">An electronics and AI-intensive profile with strong hardware and semiconductor linkages.</td>
</tr>
<tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0;">
<td style="padding:8px; vertical-align:top;"><strong>Malaysia</strong></td>
<td style="padding:8px; vertical-align:top;"><div><span class="skill-pill-row"><span class="skill-pill-common">manage administrative systems</span><span class="skill-pill-common">computer science</span><span class="skill-pill-common">perform data analysis</span></span></div><div style="margin-top:6px;"><span class="skill-pill-row"><span class="skill-pill-distinctive">financial engineering</span><span class="skill-pill-distinctive">develop reporting software</span></span></div></td>
<td style="padding:8px; vertical-align:top;">A hybrid profile combining business systems, analytics, and some finance-related digital specialisation.</td>
</tr>
<tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0;">
<td style="padding:8px; vertical-align:top;"><strong>Thailand</strong></td>
<td style="padding:8px; vertical-align:top;"><div><span class="skill-pill-row"><span class="skill-pill-common">perform data analysis</span><span class="skill-pill-common">computer science</span><span class="skill-pill-common">electrical engineering</span></span></div><div style="margin-top:6px;"><span class="skill-pill-row"><span class="skill-pill-distinctive">collect mapping data</span><span class="skill-pill-distinctive">manage keys for data protection</span></span></div></td>
<td style="padding:8px; vertical-align:top;">A more diffuse advanced profile, with data, security, and technical presentation tools rather than one dominant specialisation.</td>
</tr>
<tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0;">
<td style="padding:8px; vertical-align:top;"><strong>Indonesia</strong></td>
<td style="padding:8px; vertical-align:top;"><div><span class="skill-pill-row"><span class="skill-pill-common">computer science</span><span class="skill-pill-common">perform data analysis</span><span class="skill-pill-common">business ICT systems</span></span></div><div style="margin-top:6px;"><span class="skill-pill-row"><span class="skill-pill-distinctive">Android (mobile operating systems)</span><span class="skill-pill-distinctive">mobile device management</span></span></div></td>
<td style="padding:8px; vertical-align:top;">Business ICT systems, mobile ecosystems, and applied digital operations are more prominent than frontier engineering specialisation.</td>
</tr>
<tr style="border-bottom:1px solid #e2e8f0;">
<td style="padding:8px; vertical-align:top;"><strong>Vietnam</strong></td>
<td style="padding:8px; vertical-align:top;"><div><span class="skill-pill-row"><span class="skill-pill-common">computer science</span><span class="skill-pill-common">perform data analysis</span><span class="skill-pill-common">computer engineering</span><span class="skill-pill-common">Java</span></span></div><div style="margin-top:6px;"><span class="skill-pill-row"><span class="skill-pill-distinctive">NoSQL</span><span class="skill-pill-distinctive">use object-oriented programming</span></span></div></td>
<td style="padding:8px; vertical-align:top;">One of the strongest software-development profiles in the sample, with programming and data architecture particularly salient.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td style="padding:8px; vertical-align:top;"><strong>Philippines</strong></td>
<td style="padding:8px; vertical-align:top;"><div><span class="skill-pill-row"><span class="skill-pill-common">manage administrative systems</span><span class="skill-pill-common">perform data analysis</span><span class="skill-pill-common">perform ICT troubleshooting</span></span></div><div style="margin-top:6px;"><span class="skill-pill-row"><span class="skill-pill-distinctive">manage project metrics</span><span class="skill-pill-distinctive">develop reporting software</span></span></div></td>
<td style="padding:8px; vertical-align:top;">ICT support, reporting, and service-delivery tools stand out more than frontier engineering skills.</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
</div>

The Intermediate layer is much more homogeneous across countries.
Most economies are dominated by office software, spreadsheets,
accounting systems, CRM tools, and related business applications,
indicating that these competencies increasingly form part of the common
digital operating infrastructure of formal labour markets. What stands
out, therefore, is not a wholly different intermediate model for each
country, but a small number of country-specific emphases. In **Japan**,
intermediate demand is more closely associated with engineering systems
and decision-support tools. In **South Korea**, the clearest distinctive
elements relate to production systems, manufacturing equipment, and
program a CNC controller. In **Singapore**, the profile remains close
to a broad corporate-services model, with some additional salience of
call-centre and technical security tools. In **Thailand**, the main
signal is a stronger emphasis on confidentiality, presentation, and
content-support tools. In **Indonesia**, the intermediate layer leans
more toward digital marketing, customer-service technologies, and social
media-related tasks. In **Vietnam**, distinctive signals are concentrated
in office software, video editing, and digital marketing. In **the
Philippines**, the clearest additions are billing, accounting, and
process-management tools, consistent with a BPO and shared-services
profile.
:::::

## References

::: {#refs}
Angel-Urdinola, D., Chinen, M. H., & Rodon Casarramona, G. (2025).
Digital Skills Development: Competence Frameworks, Assessment Tools, and Pedagogical Approaches.
*Education Notes*, (203091).

Beręsewicz, M., Cherniaiev, H., Mantaj, A., & Pater, R. (2024).
Text analysis of job offers for mismatch of educational characteristics to labour market demands.
*Quality & Quantity*, 58, 1799–1825.
<https://doi.org/10.1007/s11135-023-01707-7>

Bielinski, A., & Brazier, D. (2025).
From Retrieval to Ranking: A Two-Stage Neural Framework for Automated Skill Extraction.
In *Proceedings of the RecSysHR 2025 Workshop*.

Decorte, J.-J., Van Hautte, J., Develder, C., & Demeester, T. (2025).
Efficient Text Encoders for Labor Market Analysis.
*IEEE Access*, 13, 133596–133608.

Dunning, T. (1993).
Accurate Methods for the Statistics of Surprise and Coincidence.
*Computational Linguistics*, 19(1), 61-74.

Eurostat. (2024).
*NACE Rev. 2.1: Statistical Classification of Economic Activities in the European Community*.
Luxembourg: Publications Office of the European Union.
[KS-GQ-24-007-EN-N](https://ec.europa.eu/eurostat/documents/3859598/21633320/KS-GQ-24-007-EN-N.pdf).

Huang, H., Wu, Z., Wang, M., Li, M., & Wang, X. (2023).
Towards Making the Most of LLM for Translation Quality Estimation.
In *Natural Language Processing and Chinese Computing: 12th CCF International Conference, NLPCC 2023, Proceedings, Part I* (pp. 375-386).

Malandri, L., Mercorio, F., & Serino, A. (2025).
SkiLLMo: Normalized ESCO Skill Extraction through Transformer Models.
In *Proceedings of the 40th ACM/SIGAPP Symposium on Applied Computing* (pp. 1969-1978).

Sun, Y. (2026).
Contrastive Bi-Encoder Models for Multi-Label Skill Extraction: Enhancing ESCO Ontology Matching with BERT and Attention Mechanisms.
*arXiv preprint*, arXiv:2601.09119.
:::
